content: @firebase/rules-unit-testing pitfalls: emulator must be running (ECONNREFUSED); tests flake if unsequenced; Jest needs --detectOpenHandles --forceExit; rules using get()/exists() need seed data via withSecurityRulesDisabled before assertions; only rules-unit-testing mocks auth tokens/claims; assertSucceeds/assertFails; debug() emulator-only. CRA Jest runs jsdom by default — rules tests need node env, usually separate jest config/script.
